title: Why does AI sometimes get things wrong?

hook.prompt: Why does AI sometimes get things wrong?
hook.tease: If it only saw apples, it thinks everything is an apple.

blocks.definition: If it only saw apples, it thinks everything is an apple.

realWorld.example: Weird mistakes happen when training is too narrow.
